# Known Delta-on-Gluten unit test failures.
#
# Baseline of delta-io/delta `spark` ScalaTest tests EXPECTED to fail under the
# Gluten Velox bundle. The Delta Spark UT (Gluten) workflow enforces this list:
# a failing test NOT listed here is a regression (fails CI); a listed test that
# now passes should be removed. Format: <fully.qualified.SuiteName>#<test name>.
# Lines starting with '#' are comments. See README.md in this directory.
#
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Full 16-shard baseline. Originally seeded from 15 of 16 shards (run
# 27490052632). Shard 2 used to hang/OOM-crash on DeletionVectorsSuite's 2B-row
# DV tests; those two tests are now force-failed in setup-delta.sh, so shard 2
# runs to completion and contributes 69 failures. 963 known failures total.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
io.delta.sql.DeltaExtensionAndCatalogSuite#activate Delta SQL parser using SQL conf
io.delta.sql.DeltaExtensionAndCatalogSuite#activate Delta SQL parser using withExtensions
io.delta.sql.JavaDeltaSparkSessionExtensionSuite#testSQLConf

io.delta.tables.DeltaTableHadoopOptionsSuite#forPath: as/alias/toDF with filesystem options.
